generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've been following this strategic autonomy debate closely, and I'm really concerned about how some politicians are framing it. As a retired teacher, I've seen firsthand how important it is to balance national security with our civil liberties. The idea that we need to completely cut ties with our allies to be 'truly independent' just doesn't make sense to me. Look at how well our current partnerships have worked during crises - we've maintained our sovereignty while still having strong allies. Why fix what isn't broken? #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
